note: Clinic asks the family to confirm/book — an appointment request, not a passive reminder.

input.rawContent:
From: frontdesk@littlesprout-pediatrics.ca
Subject: Please confirm your 6-month visit

Hi, it's time to schedule Baby Chen's 6-month checkup. Please call us or use the portal to pick a slot in the next two weeks. We have openings Mon-Thu mornings.
